creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
This does not build in poudriere:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'bin/teachjove' is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jove/work/stage
Error: 'bin/jove' is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jove/work/stage
Error: 'lib/jove/recover' is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jove/work/stage
*** Error code 1

This usually comes up when there are some hardcoded links around.

Would you have a look?

Cheers!
